political.s: FEC: $272K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 14 executive donors.

charity.s: $4M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.06% of revenue) via Sprouts Healthy Communities Foundation.

environment.s: Wikipedia "Sustainability" section: Sprouts participates in a food waste diversion program that provides food to those in need, feed for animals, and nutrients for agricultural soil. All edible food that is no longer fit for sale is…

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

privacy.s: Terms-of-service privacy grade D (poor) via ToS;DR (tosdr.org), CC BY-SA 3.0 — transformed to TruNorth's scale.

execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 354:1 (median employee pay $32,554) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc., is a supermarket chain headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, offering natural and organic foods, including fresh produce, bulk foods, packaged groceries, meat, poultry, seafood, deli, baked goods, dairy products, and frozen foods. They also sell vitamins and supplements, natural body care, and household items. Sprouts employs 35,000 workers and operates more than 400 stores in 24 states.

recalls.productName: Sprouts Smoked Mozzarella Pasta Salad, RTE Pasta Salad, Refrigerated, 5 day shelf life, packaged into plastic containers at Deli counter and into 16oz plastic grab & go containers, weight dependent on customer request, UPC 2-15587-00000 (from service case) and 2-15786-00000 (from Grab & Go), Sprouts Farmers Market 5455 E High St., Suite 111 Phoenix, AZ 85054.

health.s: LA City health inspections (data through 2018): all 4 LA outlets graded A across 88 inspections (avg score 95.5).

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was preparing sandwiches when she tripped over a cord on the scale and fell. The employee sustained a knee injury that required hospitalization and surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was descending a ladder when he slipped and fell with his weight landing on his leg, resulting in a broken leg.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by forward-moving vehicle in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was in the store when she saw a customer slip and fall. The employee ran outside to help the customer. A vehicle then turned into the parking lot and struck the employee causing fractures to her hip and femur.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck against stationary object while rising, lowering
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was working at a bailer. She bent down to pick something up. As she straightened, her head struck the bailer door. She suffered a pinched nerve and a bulging disk in the lower back and was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee slipped on a wet, newly cleaned floor, fell, and sustained three fractures to her pelvis.
